name: gedyon
description: GEDYON — AI-powered training for the 2028 Olympic Trials

scripts.sync:web: mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/index.html && cp 200.html www/200.html 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.ios:init: npm run sync:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync ios
